# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities publicly.

If you discover a security issue, please report it privately via email:
Mohammadmobeen.saleh@stud.hslu.ch

Please include the following information in your report:
- a short description of the issue
- the affected file, component, or area
- steps to reproduce the issue
- the potential impact
- screenshots or other helpful evidence, if available

## Response Process

After receiving a report, we aim to:
- confirm receipt within 3 working days
- review and assess the issue within 7 working days
- contact the reporter if further information is needed
- provide updates on the status where appropriate
- coordinate disclosure after a fix has been prepared, if necessary

## Scope

This policy applies to this repository.
